title: beacon-dragon-egg
description: Add more features to the original dragon egg
body: Do you think that original dragon eggs can only serve as decoration? Therefore, the author developed this modded dragon egg to function as a convenient beacon, which provides all the effects of a beacon without needing a mineral base. Additionally, within a 64-block radius centered on the dragon egg, all monsters are repelled, so avoid placing it near certain machines (such as iron farms). You can also choose whether to activate the dragon egg beacon. For convenience, holding shift and right-clicking allows you to directly return the dragon egg to your inventory.
